zh.lifeSummary: 當Leonard Potts於大約1542年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德時，他的父親John Pott26歲，母親Mrs. John Pott19歲。他於1563年8月29日與Isabell Collett在英國越可爾費亞黑斯東結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1604年享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Leonard Potts于大约1542年出生在英国英格兰波藍德时，他的父亲John Pott26岁，母亲Mrs. John Pott19岁。他于1563年8月29日与Isabell Collett在英国越可爾費亞黑斯東结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1604年享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Potts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Pott , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, in the former case denoting a Pot(t)'s son, relative or servant.

variants.name: Pott
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Aloys, Christoph, Hans, Otto.
English: from the personal name Pot, an Old French pet form of Philipot (see Philpott ), itself a pet form of Philip .

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a depression in the ground, from Middle English pot, potte ‘pot’ used in this transferred sense, or a habitational name from one of the minor places deriving their name from this word, in the sense ‘pit, hole’.

nameMeanings.name: Leonard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic origin, derived from leon ‘lion’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of a 5th-century Frankish saint, the patron of peasants and horses. Although it was introduced into Britain by the Normans, Leonard was an uncommon name during the Middle Ages. It was revived in some areas towards the end of the 1400s, and in the 19th‐century became very popular. It is now also common as a Jewish name ( compare Leon ).

variants.name: Lennard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Leonard  , in part a transferred use of the surname, which was derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Leonard Potts was born about 1542, in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Pott, was 26 and his mother, Mrs. John Pott, was 19. He married Isabell Collett on 29 August 1563, in Featherstone, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1604, at the age of 63, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Leonard Potts est né environ 1542, à Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Pott, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Pott, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Isabell Collett le 29 août 1563, à Featherstone, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1604, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Leonard Potts um 1542 in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Pott 26 und seine Mutter Mrs. John Pott 19. Er hat am 29. August 1563 in Featherstone, Yorkshire, England Isabell Collett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1604 im Alter von 63 Jahren und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Leonard Potts è nato il circa 1542 nel Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Pott, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. John Pott, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Isabell Collett il 29 agosto 1563, nel Featherstone, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1604, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Leonard Pottsが約1542年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父John Pottは26歳，母Mrs. John Pottは19歳であった。1563年8月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアフエアスエルストーンでIsabell Collettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1604年に63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Leonard Potts(이)가 대략 1542년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Pott(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Pott(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1563년 8월 29일 영국 요르크실르 피더스톤에서 Isabell Collett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1604년 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Leonard Potts nasceu aproximadamente 1542, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Pott, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Pott, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabell Collett em 29 de agosto de 1563, em Featherstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1604, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Leonard Potts родился около 1542 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Pott было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Pott, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabell Collett 29 августа 1563 г. в местности фитирстоун, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1604 г. в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Leonard Potts nació aproximadamente 1542, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Pott, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs. John Pott, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Isabell Collett el 29 de agosto de 1563, en Featherstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1604, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
